mapper.select:
SELECT hj.id, hj.name, hj.department_id, hd.name AS department_name, hj.no_of_employee, hj.company_id FROM hr_job hj LEFT JOIN hr_department hd ON hj.department_id = hd.id
AND (hj.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND hd.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.departmentName}, '%')
ORDER BY hj.id DESC
